syntax_13166.creator: GodModed
syntax_13166.title: Set Tick Rate of Player
syntax_13166.description: Set the tick rate of a player and optionally freeze / unfreeze their animations
syntax_13166.syntax_pattern: set tick rate of %players% to %number% [and (freeze|unfreeze) their animation[s]]

en: Set the tick rate of a player and optionally freeze / unfreeze their animations
